titles.ar: باب الْمَمْلُوكَةُ تَتَزَوَّجُ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ مَوَالِيهَا
titles.en: Chapter 119 – The owned slave girl gets married without the permission of her master

titles.ar: باب الْمَمْلُوكَةُ تَتَزَوَّجُ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ مَوَالِيهَا
titles.en: Chapter 119 – The owned slave girl gets married without the permission of her master

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْأَمَةِ تَتَزَوَّجُ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ أَهْلِهَا قَالَ يَحْرُمُ ذَلِكَ عَلَيْهَا وَ هُوَ الزِّنَا .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْأَمَةِ تَتَزَوَّجُ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ أَهْلِهَا قَالَ يَحْرُمُ ذَلِكَ عَلَيْهَا وَ هُوَ الزِّنَا .

segments: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr Al Bazanty, from Dawood Bin Al Husayn, from Abu Al Abbas who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the slave girl who gets married without a permission of her owner. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is Prohibited unto her and it would be the adultery’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr Al Bazanty, from Dawood Bin Al Husayn, from Abu Al Abbas who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the slave girl who gets married without a permission of her owner. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is Prohibited unto her and it would be the adultery’.

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ الْبَزَنْطِيِّ عَنْ دَاوُدَ بْنِ الْحُصَيْنِ عَنْ أَبِي الْعَبَّاسِ قَالَ

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ الْبَزَنْطِيِّ

titles.ar: باب الْمَمْلُوكَةُ تَتَزَوَّجُ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ مَوَالِيهَا
titles.en: Chapter 119 – The owned slave girl gets married without the permission of her master

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْأَمَةِ تَتَزَوَّجُ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ مَوَالِيهَا قَالَ يَحْرُمُ ذَلِكَ عَلَيْهَا وَ هُوَ زِنًى .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْأَمَةِ تَتَزَوَّجُ بِغَيْرِ إِذْنِ مَوَالِيهَا قَالَ يَحْرُمُ ذَلِكَ عَلَيْهَا وَ هُوَ زِنًى .

segments: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from one of his companions, from Aban, from Fazl Bin Abdul Malik who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the slave girl getting married without the permission of her masters. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘That is Prohibited unto her, and it is adultery’.
en.hubeali.text:
Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from one of his companions, from Aban, from Fazl Bin Abdul Malik who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the slave girl getting married without the permission of her masters. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘That is Prohibited unto her, and it is adultery’.

narratorChain.raw: الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِهِ عَنْ أَبَانٍ عَنْ فَضْلِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ قَالَ
